Sources.Title: YM REST Services — Swagger 2.0 / OpenAPI specification

Reachability.Server: Cloudflare in front of ServiceStack/5.02 NET45 (x-powered-by header)

Sources.AccessNotes: Authoritative machine-readable contract. Single best source for endpoint enumeration, request/response schema, and resource topology. Cloudflare-fronted but unauthenticated GET; no bot wall on the openapi document itself.
Sources.PrimaryUseDownstream: Endpoint enumeration, schema extraction, IO emission — feed directly into ioiof-extractor.

Sources.Title: YM REST Services — Metadata Portal (operation index)

WhatItContains.PerOperationPageContents: Required roles (admin, oauthadmin, …), routes (method + path), request parameters with DataType/REQUIRED/DESCRIPTION columns, BaseDto parameters

CoversTaxonomies: Per-Operation Auth Requirements (admin / oauthadmin roles, 'Requires Authentication' flag)
Sources.AccessNotes: Human-browsable index of operations grouped by name. Each name links to a deep page with parameter tables. Useful cross-check for OpenAPI completeness and for role-gate information (admin vs oauthadmin) that isn't always carried by OpenAPI security stanzas.
Sources.PrimaryUseDownstream: Per-operation auth/role discovery; sanity-check against OpenAPI path coverage.

Sources.Title: Getting Started with the REST API (2021 PDF, Community Brands)

Reachability.VerifiedVia: WebFetch + binary read on 2026-05-30 18:29 UTC; rendered visually with 9 pages confirmed

WhatItContains.AuthFlow: POST /Ams/Authenticate with ClientID/UserType/Username/Password → SessionId returned, used as x-ss-id header on subsequent calls; session TTL 15 minutes
WhatItContains.ExampleService: CampaignEmailLists CRUD pattern (GET list, GET by id, PUT update, DELETE list, DELETE recipient)

Sources.AccessNotes: First-party narrative document. Establishes the URL convention, the session-auth header contract, and points downstream readers to /metadata + /swagger-ui/. Older 2021 publication date but base URL + auth contract still match the live API.
Sources.PrimaryUseDownstream: Auth flow contract; ground-truth for the x-ss-id session header semantics.

Sources.Title: Getting Started with OAuth (2021 PDF, Community Brands)

Reachability.VerifiedVia: WebFetch on 2026-05-30 18:29 UTC; PDF binary; routes corroborated by search-snippet + by /OAuth/* paths in OpenAPI

WhatItContains.ClientAppSetup: Admin → General Settings → API Configuration → OAuth Management → Add Client App; configures redirect URI(s)

CoversTaxonomies: OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code + Refresh Token Flow
Sources.AccessNotes: OAuth-specific narrative. Pairs with OpenAPI /OAuth/* paths. PDF body extraction via WebFetch returned binary; key info recovered via search-snippet abstraction. Live OAuth paths in OpenAPI confirm this PDF's accuracy.
Sources.PrimaryUseDownstream: OAuth flow modeling; client-app provisioning runbook.

Sources.Title: YourMembership AMS API Overview (May 2020 PDF)

WhatItContains.Scope: Marketing-flavored overview of API capabilities and licensing model; lighter technical content than the Getting Started PDFs

Sources.AccessNotes: Marketing/positioning document. Useful for licensing context (YM requires customers to license the REST API) but not endpoint-level.

Sources.Title: YourMembership API Documentation Landing Page

WhatItContains.LinksOut: REST API Getting Started PDF, OAuth Getting Started PDF, metadata page, Swagger UI

Sources.AccessNotes: Public entry point. Confirms all four authoritative pointers (PDFs + /metadata + /swagger-ui/) come from Community Brands itself, not third parties.
Sources.PrimaryUseDownstream: Provenance anchor — proves the OpenAPI spec is the vendor's own, not a community mirror.

Sources.Title: YM REST Services — Swagger UI (interactive)
CoversTaxonomies: Same surface as the OpenAPI spec; UI render only
Sources.AccessNotes: UI wrapper around the OpenAPI spec. Use OpenAPI JSON directly for extraction.
Sources.PrimaryUseDownstream: Human reference; not used for automated extraction (OpenAPI JSON is canonical).

Sources.Title: Higher Logic — YourMembership REST API Integration Guide

WhatItContains.PartnerContext: Higher Logic is a sibling Community Brands product; this guide documents the YM↔Higher Logic SSO + member sync wiring
WhatItContains.EndpointsNamed: MemberProfile (for ReadContacts), People (for ReadContact); /Ams/{ClientID}/CampaignEmailLists; OAuth Client App setup with redirect URI {livesiteurl}/higherlogic/security/membersso/callback

CoversTaxonomies: Partner-Integration Reference Mapping (which YM resources flow to a downstream system)
Sources.AccessNotes: Third-party but corporate-sibling. Useful as a real-world worked example of which YM resources matter for member-sync use cases.
Sources.PrimaryUseDownstream: Validation that Members/People/MemberProfile are the canonical contact-sync surfaces.

Sources.Title: Rasa.io — YourMembership Integration Documentation

Reachability.VerifiedVia: curl HEAD on 2026-05-30 18:28 UTC — page has been removed/relocated by Rasa

Sources.AccessNotes: Discovered via search but currently returns 404. Recorded for transparency; not usable downstream.

Sources.Title: QuorumUS/ym-api — PHP wrapper

WhatItContains.Era: Pre-dates the current /Ams REST API; references the legacy yourmembership.com/company/api-reference (XML-RPC era)
WhatItContains.Coverage: Self-described work-in-progress; only Session.Create concretely demonstrated

Sources.AccessNotes: Legacy. Helpful as a sanity-check of which resource names existed in the XML-RPC era, NOT as a reference for the current ws.yourmembership.com REST API.
Sources.PrimaryUseDownstream: None — superseded. Listed for completeness so downstream agents don't waste cycles on it.

Sources.Title: ECHOInternational/your_membership — Ruby SDK (legacy XML API v2.00)

WhatItContains.Era: Legacy XML API v2.00 (different surface from the current REST API)
WhatItContains.Namespaces: Events, Member, Sa (system admin), Session, People, Profile, Export

CoversTaxonomies: (historical only — XML API v2.00 noun set)
Sources.AccessNotes: Legacy XML API only. The current REST API at ws.yourmembership.com is a separate generation with overlapping but not identical resource names. DO NOT extract IOs from this; use only as a hint for what 'classical' YM nouns exist.
Sources.PrimaryUseDownstream: None for extraction; historical reference only.

Coverage.WebhookOrEventDocs: Partial (Zoom event listener endpoints present in OpenAPI but no narrative webhook docs found)
Coverage.RateLimitDocs: Not found in any public source — gap
Coverage.ErrorCatalog: Not found in any public source — gap (only ResponseStatus shape from Getting Started PDF)
Coverage.ChangeLog: Not found in any public source — gap
Coverage.PostmanCollection: Not found — gap. PDF shows Postman screenshots but no published .postman_collection.json

Gaps: Rate-limit policy (RPS, daily quotas, throttle headers) — no published documentation
Error code catalog beyond the generic ServiceStack ResponseStatus shape
Webhook/Push event subscription docs (Zoom listener endpoints exist but no narrative)
Changelog / version history for the REST API
Published Postman collection (the Getting Started PDF uses Postman in screenshots only)
Per-field semantic documentation for the larger DTOs in the 656-definition schema is limited — descriptions are short or absent on many properties

Statistics.TopSourceCoverage: 297 paths, 656 schemas, 6 tags — complete machine-readable contract

Decision.Rationale: Vendor publishes a complete machine-readable OpenAPI spec at ws.yourmembership.com/openapi (Tier 1) plus official Getting Started PDFs for auth flows. Coverage across taxonomies is strong enough to drive ioiof-extractor without escalation. Gaps (rate-limits, error catalog) are real but not blocking — they affect operational hardening, not entity/endpoint extraction.
